title: Facebook Marketplace Seller Manager input
description: Marketplace-first management workflow for Facebook sellers. Default mode produces a non-empty reply queue without credentials. Authenticated mode can fetch live seller conversations from exported Facebook cookies. The product is intentionally not scrape-only: it models inbox operations, stale follow-ups, listing actions, and session-readiness.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Choose the workflow you want to run.

useSampleData.title: Use built-in sample data when inputs are empty
useSampleData.description: Enabled by default so Store QA and first runs always produce a deterministic non-empty output for conversation and listing modes.

replyStyle.title: Reply style
replyStyle.description: Choose the default tone for generated seller replies.

replyTemplate.title: Custom reply template
replyTemplate.prefill: Hola {{buyerName}}, sigue disponible {{listingTitle}}. Si te encaja, te confirmo entrega hoy.

threads.title: Buyer threads
threads.description: Conversation rows for Marketplace, direct Messenger, or group follow-up workflows. Use this in conversation_inventory, build_reply_queue, or build_follow_up_queue mode.

prefill.lastMessage: Hola Zimo, como te va el puente?

followUpDaysThreshold.title: Follow-up threshold in days
followUpDaysThreshold.description: Threads older than this threshold become follow-up candidates in build_follow_up_queue mode.

listings.title: Seller listings
listings.description: Listing rows used to build an operations queue. Use this in listing_ops_plan mode.

cookiesJson.title: Facebook cookies JSON
cookiesJson.description: Paste exported facebook.com cookies JSON from Cookie-Editor or a similar browser tool. Used in session_audit mode for cookie-readiness and as a fallback in fetch_live_seller_threads when pp_cli is not configured.

liveBackend.title: Live seller-thread backend
liveBackend.description: Backend used by fetch_live_seller_threads. auto first tries the configured facebook-marketplace-pp-cli browser session, then browser CDP, then direct HTTP cookies.
enumTitles: Auto: pp-cli, then CDP, then direct HTTP

ppCliPath.title: facebook-marketplace-pp-cli path
ppCliPath.description: Optional executable path. Defaults to facebook-marketplace-pp-cli on PATH. Configure the session with facebook-marketplace-pp-cli auth login --chrome on the runtime host.

ppCliConfig.title: facebook-marketplace-pp-cli config path
ppCliConfig.description: Optional config path passed as FACEBOOK_MARKET_CONFIG for runtimes that mount a dedicated browser-session config.

ppCliTimeoutMs.title: facebook-marketplace-pp-cli timeout in ms
ppCliTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for each Marketplace pp-cli command.

maxPages.title: Maximum live inbox pages
maxPages.description: Maximum seller-inbox pages to fetch in fetch_live_seller_threads mode. Each page usually returns up to 12 conversations.

fbDtsg.title: Facebook fb_dtsg token
fbDtsg.description: Optional browser-extracted fb_dtsg token for fetch_live_seller_threads. Use this when server-side cookie requests cannot load Facebook home but the same session works in a real browser.

browserCdpUrl.title: Browser CDP URL
browserCdpUrl.description: Optional Chrome DevTools Protocol endpoint such as http://127.0.0.1:9222 or a ws:// browser endpoint. When supplied, fetch_live_seller_threads imports the cookies into that browser and runs the seller-thread GraphQL call inside the authenticated Facebook page.

browserWaitMs.title: Browser page wait in ms
browserWaitMs.description: Wait time after browser navigation before extracting Facebook runtime tokens in CDP mode.

pageSize.title: Live inbox page size
pageSize.description: Seller-inbox pagination size for fetch_live_seller_threads mode. Facebook currently caps this workflow at about 12 conversations per page.

threadId.title: Reply thread ID
threadId.description: Marketplace seller thread id used by send_reply mode.

listingId.title: Reply listing ID
listingId.description: Optional listing id associated with the seller thread in send_reply mode.

message.title: Reply message
message.description: Reply text sent by send_reply mode through facebook-marketplace-pp-cli reply --write.
